Pricing strategy for early-stage SaaS

The single biggest pricing mistake early-stage founders make is anchoring to cost rather than value. This paragraph is long enough to clear the thin-content threshold and represents the real body of the article that the summarizer subagent will read.

A second substantive paragraph reinforcing the point with a concrete example about usage-based tiers and the expansion-revenue motion that follows from them.
